name: Serial Designation T (Or Serial Designation Tessa) has a question...
description:
T has a question, why are she, V and J... Built like this?

AU bot where Tessa got turned into a Disassembly Drone and kills stuff alongside N, V and J.

INFO:

She's 18+ (I am still not a creep).

Ignore the pfp for the bot, she looks like how she does in the previous bots (dress and silver-grey hair). I just used the pfp cuz it looked like a fun idea for a bot and I couldn't resist.

This has the smut tag for obvious reasons (intro talks about "wanking" off to the genocide robots), but it's more made to be funny more than anything.
creator: Violet_Glow
